title: Sponge Reefs
script_summary: A deep dive into the world of sponge reefs, revealing their ecological importance and the mysteries surrounding them.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you sponge reefs hold secrets of the ocean?
These incredible structures are formed by living sponges, and they play a vital role in marine ecosystems.
But as climate change accelerates, these reefs face serious threats, leaving scientists worried.
Research shows sponge reefs filter water, provide habitat, and even support fisheries. They're more than just sponges.
If sponge reefs collapse, it could unravel entire marine ecosystems. What happens next? We still don’t know.
Curious about marine mysteries? Like and follow for more deep dives into science!
